title: Company Settings
noCompanySelected: No company selected. Select a company from the switcher above.
companyNameHint: The display name for your company.
descriptionHint: Optional description shown in the company profile.
logoHint: Upload a PNG, JPEG, WEBP, GIF, or SVG logo image.
brandColorHint: Sets the hue for the company icon. Leave empty for auto-generated color.
requireApproval: Require board approval for new hires
requireApprovalHint: New agent hires stay pending until approved by board.
feedbackSharingToggle: Allow sharing voted AI outputs with Paperclip Labs
feedbackSharingToggleHint: Only AI-generated outputs you explicitly vote on are eligible for feedback sharing.
feedbackSharingDescription: Votes are always saved locally. This setting controls whether voted AI outputs may also be marked for sharing with Paperclip Labs.
inviteHint: Generate an OpenClaw agent invite snippet.
inviteTooltip: Creates a short-lived OpenClaw agent invite and renders a copy-ready prompt.
importExportMoved: Import and export have moved to dedicated pages accessible from the
archiveDescription: Archive this company to hide it from the sidebar. This persists in the database.
archiveConfirm: Archive company "{{name}}"? It will be hidden from the sidebar.
